name: orchestrator-session-start
description: Inject Orchestrator guidance at session start for complex ProTraderSim development workflows

context.title: ProTraderSim Development Workflow
context.message:
🎯 **Welcome to ProTraderSim Development!**

For complex tasks involving multiple agents, layers, or cross-cutting concerns, please start by using the **@orchestrator** agent. The Orchestrator will:

✅ Decompose complex tasks into atomic subtasks
✅ Assign each subtask to the appropriate specialist agent
✅ Coordinate parallel workstreams and track progress
✅ Consolidate results and ensure completeness

**When to use Orchestrator:**
• Building new features end-to-end
• Handling cross-cutting concerns (auth + DB + frontend + tests)
• Planning sprints or multi-agent workflows
• When unsure which agent to use

**Quick start:** `@orchestrator [describe your complex task]`

For simple, single-agent tasks, you can proceed directly with specialized agents.
